mnemonics.title: LOGIC GATES
mnemonics.content: THE AND GATE NEEDS ALL 1S TO BE 1. FOR OR GATE, JUST 1 INPUT GIVES 1 OUTPUT. NOT GATE SIMPLY FLIPS THE BIT.

mnemonics.title: BOOLEAN OPERATIONS
mnemonics.content: OR IS LIKE ADDITION (A+B), AND IS LIKE MULTIPLICATION (A·B), NOT IS FLIPPING (A')

mnemonics.title: TRUTH TABLE ROWS
mnemonics.content: COUNT BINARY FROM 0: 2^N INPUTS = 2 TO THE POWER OF N ROWS IN YOUR TABLE

acronyms.usage: Used to model and simulate digital systems before fabrication (e.g., Verilog, VHDL)
Standard HDL used for digital design and verification, VHSIC means Very High Speed Integrated Circuit
Graphical method for Boolean function simplification and logic minimization
Design abstraction level in HDL that describes data flow between registers
Technology used to fabricate digital integrated circuits using MOSFETs

visualTips.visualization: DRAW A SMOOTH WAVEFORM FOR ANALOG (LIKE A SINE WAVE) AND STEP-LIKE SQUARE WAVES FOR DIGITAL SHOWING ONLY TWO LEVELS (0V AND 5V)
AND GATE LOOKS LIKE A D SHAPE (BULLET AT OUTPUT), OR GATE HAS CURVED INPUT SIDE (SHIELD SHAPE), NOT GATE IS TRIANGLE WITH SMALL CIRCLE AT TIP
WRITE INPUT COLUMNS ON LEFT, OUTPUT ON RIGHT. COUNT IN BINARY: 00, 01, 10, 11 - THIS SYSTEMATIC ORDER HELPS YOU NOT MISS ANY ROW
FOR EACH ROW WHERE OUTPUT IS 1, WRITE A PRODUCT TERM OF ALL INPUTS (USE INPUT IF 1, USE COMPLEMENT IF 0), THEN OR ALL THESE TERMS TOGETHER

analogies.analogy: THINK OF LOGIC GATES LIKE LIGHT SWITCHES: AND GATE IS LIKE TWO SWITCHES IN SERIES (BOTH MUST BE ON FOR LIGHT), OR GATE IS LIKE TWO SWITCHES IN PARALLEL (EITHER CAN TURN LIGHT ON)
DIGITAL ABSTRACTION IS LIKE READING A VOLTAGE METER AND ONLY CARING WHETHER IT SHOWS 'HIGH' OR 'LOW' IGNORING EXACT NUMBERS - JUST LIKE ROUNDING NUMBERS MAKES MATH EASIER
BOOLEAN ALGEBRA IS LIKE SET THEORY: AND IS INTERSECTION (COMMON), OR IS UNION (ALL), NOT IS COMPLEMENT (EVERYTHING EXCEPT)
COMBINATIONAL CIRCUIT IS LIKE A CALCULATOR (SAME INPUT ALWAYS GIVES SAME OUTPUT), SEQUENTIAL CIRCUIT IS LIKE A LOCK THAT REMEMBERS IF YOU TURNED IT PARTIALLY BEFORE
